ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the emissions are recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded emissions */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector associated with the emissions */,
  "value_ktco2" REAL /* Value of emissions in kilotonnes of CO2 per day */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "emission_source" TEXT /* Source of the emissions data (e.g., self-reported, estimated) */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emissions (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "emission_category" TEXT /* Category of emissions (e.g., scope 1, scope 2, scope 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Aviation, Transportation) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the emission data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the emission data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES emissions ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_sector_emissions" (
  "city_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-sector combination */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Emissions value for the city-sector combination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_sector_emissions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_sector_emissions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Emissions value for the city-sector combination */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_trends_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
